title: Biome Based Creakings
description: Creakings now match the wood of the biome they spawn in
body:
This pack makes creakings match the wood type of the biome they spawn in.

You can also rename a creaking to a wood type, and they will change to match chat.

If you want the rename functionality without them spawning naturally, you can disable natural spawning with respackopts

Creakings also blink now. they will close their eyes when frozen (though you may catch them sneaking the occasional peek)

The features of this pack are also included in creatures+:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creatures+

![all the variants ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/X2808cdF/images/e9d0528d6713e7f7df584b5fde0eedebeaa0caed_350.webp)
